_HINWEIS: Channel-übergreifende Adapter-Einstellungen. Pro-Channel Auth/Whitelist liegt im jeweiligen channel/settings.json.

routing._NOTE: Auto-routing — modes: 'off' (never route), 'heuristic' (regex keyword matcher, 0 ms, no API key), 'embedding' (heuristic first, then OpenAI text-embedding-3-small for semantic match — uses the OPENAI_API_KEY already loaded for TTS/Whisper, ~150 ms latency, ~$0.0000006 per request, multilingual), 'auto' (embedding first, then Haiku LLM via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for hard edge cases). Default 'embedding' is the right pick for Max-subscription users without an Anthropic key. Anchors per persona live in operator/cowork/personas/*.json under routing_anchors.
